name: Fly Machines
notes: Stopped Fly Machines are not free; they are charged for the root file system storage at $0.15 per 1GB for 30 days.
price_headline: $0.0027 per hour for a shared 256 MB instance
summary: Fly Machines are fast-booting, lightweight virtual machines powered by Firecracker microVMs. They provide isolated compute environments used by developers to run arbitrary code and as secure sandboxes for AI agents.
